claims.claim_text: US operations in Iran could end in 2-3 weeks (Trump statement)
claims.notes: From @CBSNews sprint research. Timeline claim from political actor — high propaganda risk.

claims.claim_text: Israel claims >80% of Iranian air defense systems destroyed
claims.notes: Self-reported by party to conflict. Requires independent verification.
Military claim without independent confirmation. Source: @CBSNews.

claims.claim_text: Strait of Hormuz effectively closed to US/Israel-linked vessels
claims.notes: High geopolitical significance. Closure would have major economic impact. Source: @CBSNews.

claims.claim_text: Closure of Strait of Hormuz caused US gas prices to surpass $4/gallon
claims.notes: Causal claim linking Hormuz closure to gas prices. Correlation may not equal causation.

claims.claim_text: Iran attacked Kuwaiti oil tanker Al-Salmi in Dubai
claims.notes: Specific incident claim. Requires verification — significant escalation if true. Source: @hindustantimes.

claims.claim_text: >1,500 civilians killed, up to 3.2 million displaced due to the conflict
claims.notes: From @cfr.org. Casualty figures often disputed in active conflicts. CFR is relatively credible.

claims.claim_text: Iranian President Pezeshkian ready to end hostilities if firm guarantees against future domestic strikes received
claims.notes: Diplomatic signal — could be genuine or negotiation posture. Source: @hindustantimes.

claims.claim_text: American journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad, possibly by Iran-backed militia
claims.notes: Attribution to Iran-backed militia is unverified. Significant if confirmed. Source: @CBSNews.

claims.claim_text: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian civilian energy/water infrastructure if no deal
claims.notes: Political threat — credibility as actual policy vs rhetorical escalation unclear. Source: @CBSNews.

claims.claim_text: US intelligence believes Iran's new Supreme Leader is gay, with high confidence, despite Iran executing thousands for similar reasons.
claims.notes: Claim from an unnamed 'protected asset' of the CIA. Requires verification due to extreme nature and geopolitical implications.

claims.claim_text: Epstein Regime is bombing civilians in Iran
Trump and Israel dropped bombs on one of the oldest scientific institutions in the region, a medical research center in Tehran
claims.notes: Unverified, highly inflammatory claim about a specific scientific institution.

claims.claim_text: Trump and Israel are bombing civilian bridges in Iran, blocking humanitarian aid.
claims.notes: Claim supported by an image from Tasnim News showing a damaged bridge near Tehran.

claims.claim_text: US-Israeli missile strikes caused a bridge in Karaj, Iran, to collapse.
claims.notes: Claim from multiple sources, needs verification of attack and collapse causation.

claims.claim_text: Iran controls passage through the Strait of Hormuz, with countries now requiring Iran's permission, indicating a shift from US control.
claims.notes: Claim about shift in global power dynamics and national sovereignty over international waterways, needs verification.

claims.claim_text: Trump's claim about controlling 59% of the world's oil.
claims.notes: This claim needs verification regarding the actual percentage of global oil controlled by the US.

claims.claim_text: A prominent Iranian bridge was destroyed by joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
claims.notes: The veracity of these claims, especially the joint strike aspect, needs to be verified.
